title: Praxis Educational Leadership: Administration and Supervision (5412) — 200 Source Questions + 300 Guided Review
description: Contains 200 source diagnostic questions and 300 source-derived guided-review tasks; the assistant audit found 100 distinct source content kernels. Two independently authored 100-question diagnostic batches aligned to the six current 5412 leadership categories, linked to a 12-chapter learning library, targeted practice, diagnostics, and an optional 120-question timed simulation.
contentReview: Assistant audit completed: the 200 source questions contain 100 distinct content kernels and 100 parallel variants under the normalized answer-set/rationale/reference test. The 300 additional activities are assistant-reviewed guided reasoning transformations, not independent exam questions. The 500-distinct-question target is not met.
simulationNote: The official 5412 test currently contains 120 selected-response questions in 165 minutes. This simulation uses original independent practice items and is not an official test form.
disclaimer: Independent preparation material. Not affiliated with or endorsed by ETS or NPBEA. The official Praxis Educational Leadership: Administration and Supervision (5412) test currently has 120 selected-response questions in 165 minutes; these diagnostics and the simulation are not official forms. Practice results are not official or scaled Praxis scores, pass predictions, credentials, employment or licensure decisions, legal advice, personnel findings, disciplinary determinations, emergency directives, or substitutes for qualified leadership judgment and current federal, state, local, board, contract, certification, privacy, civil-rights, safety, procurement, and educational requirements.

items.prompt: What should precede revision of a school mission?
choices: Analyze disaggregated student, opportunity, implementation, climate, and stakeholder evidence before facilitating an inclusive review.
Copy a highly rated school mission.
Ask only the leadership team to draft it privately.
Delay all review until test scores rise.
items.rationale: A mission should respond to the actual school context and each student, so leaders first establish a representative evidence base and an inclusive process.
choiceRationales: Correct. A mission should respond to the actual school context and each student, so leaders first establish a representative evidence base and an inclusive process.

bankDisclosure: This pack has 500 learning activities, not 500 independent exam questions: 200 source questions (100 distinct content kernels; 100 parallel variants) plus 300 source-derived guided-review activities. 400 newly authored independent questions are needed to reach the 500-question target.
